enterprise_muted.description: Restrained, professional iOS UI with desaturated palettes, tabular data emphasis, and subdued accents. Trades visual flair for legibility and operational density.

fitness_vitality.description: High-energy iOS UI built around motion data, vivid metric pills, gradient halos, and ring-style progress indicators.

editorial_photography.description: Image-led iOS UI where photography drives the surface, type recedes into supporting role, and chrome is intentionally minimal.

minimalist_monochrome.description: Restricted-palette iOS UI built around grayscale surfaces with a single accent, generous spacing, and uniform geometry.

data_dense_terminal.description: Compact iOS UI for power users: tabular layouts, mono accents, tight row heights, and command-style affordances.

warm_handcrafted.description: Tactile iOS UI with warm earth-tone palettes, soft gradients, hand-feel iconography, and approachable typography.

editorial_canvas.description: Magazine-inflected iOS UI: serif headings, structured columnar layouts, generous spacing, content-first chrome.

tactile_depth_playful.description: iOS UI that leans on depth, shadow, and 3D-feeling controls; bouncy motion and saturated highlights.

youth_social_widget.description: Vibrant iOS UI optimized for short-form social, widget cards, and expressive avatars; bold accents on light surfaces.

system_default_plus.description: iOS UI that hews close to native HIG with light brand customization: SF Pro typography, system chrome, single brand accent.
